  • Clapham Junction after 04:29 and before 09:10;
  • Stratford (London) after 04:29 and before 09:38 and after 16:34 and before 18:42.

Other journeys:

Not timed to depart:

  • Cowes East or Cowes West on Red Funnel ferry services after 04:29 and before 09:14
  • CrossCountry: services timed to depart after 04:29 and before 08:45
  • Guildford: after 04:29 and before 09:11 (towards Redhill); after 04:29 and before 08:44 (towards Reading)

  • Reading: after 04:29 and before 08:25 (towards Redhill)
  • Wokingham: after 04:29 and before 08:34 (towards Redhill)
